posts.text:
This is vindictive, fascist stuff. 

We need a non partisan watchdog at the FCC, not a partisan attack dog. 

If Carr continues down this route, Democrats will hold him accountable. Threatening broadcasters’ licenses for war coverage this administration doesn’t like is the worst thing Carr has done - and that’s saying something.


Brendan Carr (@BrendanCarrFCC)

Broadcasters that are running hoaxes and news distortions - also known as the fake news - have a chance now to correct course before th

Happy Sikh New Year to all those celebrating! Today we welcome the month of Chet and the start of the new year in the Nanakshahi Calendar. 

Wishing the vibrant Sikh community in NYC and around the world a joyful and blessed year ahead.

9/11 survivors are dying of cancer, fighting to breathe and Trump is reportedly ripping away their care to staff ICE. It is a disgrace and betrayal to our first responders.

This will delay care and increase wait times for the 140,000 survivors in the program.

Trump and Secretary Kennedy must reverse these reassignments immediately.


New York Daily News (@NYDailyNews)

Advocates for the 9/11 community are demanding a hearing with U.S. Department of Health and Human Services Secretary Robert Ke

Trump and Republicans think rising gas prices are “a small price to pay”—they should try to tell that to Americans who must now choose between filling their tank and putting food on the table.

Video

As millions of Americans make unthinkable sacrifices to afford health care after Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans slashed Medicaid and the ACA and made health care unaffordable, we are spending billions per day on another war in the Middle East.

This is the opposite of what Americans voted for.

I am devastated to learn of the deaths of six crew members aboard a U.S. Air Force refueling aircraft that went down in western Iraq yesterday. 
 
There is no greater sacrifice than that which these brave airmen gave to our country. I am grieving with their families for this unthinkable loss. They are all heroes and will be remembered as such. 
 
May their memories be a blessing.

Another heartbreaking attack occurred yesterday at Old Dominion University in Virginia.

My deepest condolences go to the victims and their families. Thank God for the brave students on campus who fought back against the attacker before he was able to injure more people – they are heroes and the absolute best amongst us.


CBS News (@CBSNews)

Brave ROTC students were credited with stopping the deadly classroom shooting at Old Dominion on Thursday, after one of the students in the classroom kill

The U.S. economy is stagnating under Donald Trump.
 
Inflation is getting worse, and that was BEFORE Trump's disastrous decision to take America to war, massively spiking the price of oil.
 
He has no plan, no endgame, and American families are already suffering as a result.


The New York Times (@nytimes)

Breaking News: U.S. economic growth was slower at the end of 2025 than previously thought, and consumer prices crept higher in January. nyti.ms/4t35cUX




— https://nitter.net/nytimes/status

Donald Trump is Putin’s puppet. 

Always has been, always will be.


Kyle Griffin (@kylegriffin1)

Breaking NYT:

The Trump admin just lifted sanctions on Russian oil currently at sea — allowing it to be shipped to buyers around the world as Trump scrambles to contain soaring energy prices because of his war with Iran.

The admin claims the move is temporary. nytimes.com/2026/03/12/us/po…




— https://nitter.net/kylegriffin1/status/2032296875538174371#m

Democrats are ready to fund TSA. Republicans are blocking it. Democrats are ready to fund CISA. Republicans are blocking it. Democrats are ready to fund FEMA. And Coast Guard.  Republicans are blocking it.

Our Declaration of Independence says it best: “ALL men are created equal and are endowed by their creator with certain inalienable rights. That among these rights are life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.”

In this case that means hosting an Iftar Ramadan meal celebrated with the man who was chosen by a strong majority of New York voters, @ZohranKMamdani. That is called AMERICAN democracy.

And trust me, nobody is silencing you – you never stop running your mouth.


Coach Tommy Tuberville
My statement on the Temple Israel Attack in West Bloomfield, Michigan:

I am closely monitoring the situation at Temple Israel in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan and am praying for the wellbeing of the schoolchildren, congregants, synagogue staff, and first responders. 
 
I’m grateful to the local police for their quick response and will continue to track the situation as it unfolds.


The Detroit News (@detroitnews)

#BREAKING: Active shooter alert issued at West Bloomfield synagogue.
detroitnews.com/story/news/l…




— https://nitter.net/detroitnews/status/203213956444

How did Donald Trump not see the crisis with the Strait of Hormuz coming?

A college student with a basic understanding of geopolitics could tell you that Iran's greatest leverage is this narrow passage through which a huge share of the world's oil must travel. And now the administration is scrambling to contain the damage and deal with rising oil prices.

This is mindless hate. Muslim Americans are cops, doctors, nurses, teachers, bankers, bricklayers, mothers, fathers, neighbors, mayors, and more.

Islamophobic hate like this is fundamentally un-American and we must confront and overcome it whenever it rears its ugly head.


Coach Tommy Tuberville (@SenTuberville)

The enemy is inside the gates.



— https://nitter.net/SenTuberville/status/2032087973810901496#m

I just chased @LeaderJohnThune off the Senate floor. 
 
The @SenateGOP can't win this argument. Fund TSA now.

Video

Today's ruling makes it unequivocally clear: the Trump administration must continue to fund the Gateway Tunnel Project.

I have spent years fighting for this project, and we will not stop until every committed federal dollar reaches Gateway and workers can count on staying on the job for good.

Trump is doing what I called for three days ago, after needlessly sowing additional chaos and uncertainty. 

But he’s already created a lot more problems than this will solve – from the Strait of Hormuz blockade to his poorly planned and reckless war, Americans are the ones routinely paying the price.


NewsWire (@NewsWire_US)

Trump says he will tap Strategic Petroleum Reserve to try to 'bring prices down'



— https://nitter.net/NewsWire_US/status/2031831712196395464#m

Jeremy Carl, Donald Trump’s nominee to serve as Assistant Secretary of State for International Organization Affairs, withdrew his nomination.

Good riddance to that white supremacist, right-wing bigot. Jeremy Carl had a long history of being antisemitic and openly racist. I am glad he was exposed and rejected.

I will continue to fight back against Donald Trump’s openly white supremacist and antisemitic nominees.


NBC News (@NBCNews)

President Trump's pick for a senior role at the State Depart
